title: Boundary blow-up solutions in the unit ball : asymptotics, uniqueness   and symmetry
summary:
We calculate the full asymptotic expansion of boundary blow-up so- lutions,
for any nonlinearity f . Our approach enables us to state sharp qualitative
results regarding uniqueness and ra- dial symmetry of solutions, as well as a
characterization of nonlinearities for which the blow-up rate is universal. At
last, we study in more detail the standard nonlinearities f (u) = u^p, p > 1

title: $L^p$--regularity for parabolic operators with unbounded time--dependent   coefficients
summary:
We establish the maximal regularity for nonautonomous Ornstein-Uhlenbeck
operators in $L^p$-spaces with respect to a family of invariant measures, where
$p\in (1,+\infty)$. This result follows from the maximal $L^p$-regularity for a
class of elliptic operators with unbounded, time-dependent drift coefficients
and potentials acting on $L^p(\R^N)$ with Lebesgue measure.
